name: Dragonic Pendulum
name_jp: ドラゴニック<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ペンデュラム</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: All "Dracoslayer" monsters on the field gain 300 ATK/DEF. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dragonic Pendulum" once per turn. If a Dragon "Dracoslayer" monster you control activates its effect (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. If this card on the field is destroyed: You can either add to your hand or Special Summon 1 "Dracoslayer" or "Dracoverlord" monster from your Deck.
eff: All "Dracoslayer" monsters on the field gain 300 ATK/DEF. You can only use each of the following effects of "Dragonic Pendulum" once per turn. If a Dragon "Dracoslayer" monster you control activates its effect (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it. If this card on the field is destroyed: You can either add to your hand or Special Summon 1 "Dracoslayer" or "Dracoverlord" monster from your Deck.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack
